title: - `::ET4L` → label, collaborative distribution
content:
- `::ET4L` → label, collaborative distribution
- `::AMP.LABS.MEDIA` → syllabus licensing, public research

---

### V. SYMBOLS + GLYPHS SYSTEM (To Be Designed)

Every node will receive:
- One unique glyph (project or ID)
- One logic-mode glyph (Reality / Dream / Hybrid)
- One output-format glyph (Tool / Art / Text / etc.)

Options:
- Unicode + Emoji system
- ASCII-style minimal glyphs
- Custom vector renderings (SVG, PNG, font set)

---

### VI. EXPORT FORMAT FOR NOTES (Live as You Build)

Each Note = Modular Unit
Must include:
- `::TITLE`
- `::REF_ID`
- `::CATEGORY` (Artist ID / Project / Tool)
- `::LOGIC_MODE`
- `::USAGE` (internal, public, GitHub, etc.)
